title: OSF Constraint Block (next/, Option C — JSON-as-SSOT)
description: Meta-schema for the 'constraints' attribute facet added by the SDC-inspired augmentation track. Validates the STRUCTURE of constraint rules embedded in profiles/machines/*.json (or other profile categories). The actual TYPE-correctness of predicate values against the referenced attribute.dataType is enforced by next/ci/lint-constraints.mjs (separate lint step — JSON Schema cannot express the cross-reference). One meta-schema for all asset types; constraint instances live per profile and inherit via parentType.

description.description: Human-readable rule description (becomes sh:message in the SHACL build artifact)

when.description: Optional precondition — if absent, 'require' is checked unconditionally

require.description: Must hold when 'when' is true (or always, if 'when' is absent)

severity.description: error -> sh:Violation + opens steward queue; warning -> sh:Warning + telemetry-only

discrepancyClass.description: Pins the emitted discrepancy class. Requires 'constraint' in profiles/intelligence/discrepancy.json#discrepancy_class enum AND in services/discrepancy-engine/src/types.ts.

since.description: Date the constraint was introduced — used to gate alerts on legacy data

attr.description: References an attribute.name within the same profile (or an inherited one). next/ci/lint-constraints.mjs resolves this against the profile's attribute array.

op.description: Comparison operator. 'in' expects an array value. 'between' expects [lo, hi].

value.description: Comparison value. Type is checked at lint-time against the referenced attribute.dataType (Int32/Float -> number; String -> string; Boolean -> boolean). For op='in' must be array; for op='between' must be [lo, hi].
